---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What's the use case? What's currently hard or impossible to do?

## Proposed solution

What would you like the CLI to do? A concrete command-line example helps:

```bash
project-cli ...
```

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've thought about, including workarounds you're using
today.

## Additional context

Any related decisions in [`design/decisions/`](../../design/decisions/) or
plans in [`design/plans/`](../../design/plans/) that this would interact
with.
